summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Driver Gig CRM application. Backend APIs are 100% functional. Frontend UI and integration testing shows excellent functionality with minor registration form issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Name input field not found with placeholder containing 'name' - registration form may have different field structure

design_issues.issue: Missing DialogTitle and Description for accessibility - console warnings about screen reader accessibility

passed_tests: All CRUD operations for companies, activities, earnings - 100% success
Companies page table/card view toggle works
Companies page search and filtering works
Company drawer opens and displays all sections
Company drawer form editing and saving works
Pipeline Kanban board displays with 6 columns and 10 cards
Activity Log page with table, search, and export works
Earnings Tracker page with summary cards, charts, and form works
Settings page with handler management, profile, and data export works
Sidebar navigation works across all pages
Auth protection works - redirects to login when not authenticated
AI recommendation endpoint works with real LLM integration
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix registration form name input field selector issue - the current placeholder text may not contain 'name' or field structure is different than expected
